message:
feat(daemon): v0.3.1 production stability and false-alarm suppression

A cohesive set of improvements targeting production failure modes
observed during high-activity coding agent swarms:

Scanner efficiency & safety:
- Cache known .git directories across scan passes to avoid re-discovering
  and re-rejecting the same project roots every scan cycle (previously
  generated thousands of ContainsGit log entries per hour)
- Check .git before scoring to skip project roots early, both in the
  priority pre-scan and the main DirEntry iteration
- Reduce scan_time_budget_secs default from 600 to 300 to tighten the
  scan feedback loop

Policy deadlock fix:
- Fix observe_window deadlock: when pressure is green and guard status
  is Unknown (not Fail), count it as a clean window. Miscalibrated
  predictions are harmless with plenty of free space, but requiring
  guard calibration that can never happen without deletions creates a
  deadlock that blocks recovery entirely

Log noise reduction:
- Suppress SBH-2003 error logging for PathGone (parent already deleted)
  and ContainsGit (normal project root) skip reasons, which are expected
  conditions not errors

Ballast replenishment tolerance:
- Allow up to 3 brief non-green interruptions during the replenishment
  cooldown window (e.g. compilation bursts that spike to Yellow for one
  tick) without resetting the entire cooldown. Only reset green_since
  after 4+ consecutive non-green ticks. Includes regression test.

Predictive false-alarm suppression:
- Add free-space sanity gate: when burst detector is calibrated but
  hasn't flagged a burst (probability < 0.5), and implied consumption
  rate exceeds 5%/min with >20% free space, require proportionally
  higher confidence. Targets the specific production failure mode of
  "31% free, disk full in 5m at 73% confidence" during rustc bursts
  that the burst detector correctly scored at 0.3

Version bump: 0.3.0 -> 0.3.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 [package]
 name = "storage_ballast_helper"
-version = "0.3.0"
+version = "0.3.1"
 edition = "2024"
 license = "MIT"
 description = "System service that prevents disk-full scenarios from coding agent swarms via ballast files, artifact scanning, and special location monitoring."
